query:
SELECT 
  ql.id as leadId, ql.name, ql.phone, ql.createdAt as leadCreatedAt,
  cs.id as sessionId, cs.isBooked, cs.stage, cs.updatedAt
FROM quote_leads ql
LEFT JOIN conversation_sessions cs ON cs.leadPhone = ql.phone
WHERE ql.phone LIKE '%2022582430%' OR ql.phone = '+12022582430'
ORDER BY ql.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 5;
